entries.note: BFLA firewall bypass via Epuser account. V5-V2 confirmed affected (<=V5R021C00S184). V5 (<=V5R019C00S100). EG8141A5 (<=V5R019C00S100).
Pre-auth firmware metadata, CSRF tokens, build info disclosure. Same BBSP/ASP stack on Dopra Linux across V5/V5-V2/X6.
Static CSRF token + server does not validate token at all. Same getRandString.asp on V5/V5-V2/X6.
Pre-auth user enumeration via CheckPwdNotLogin.asp differential response. Same BBSP endpoint across Dopra Linux family.
Rate-limit bypass via session rotation. Client-side only on all V5/X6 models.
Universal AES key hex:13395537D2730554A176799F6D56A239 for hw_ctree.xml. Affects ALL Huawei ONTs using Dopra Linux.
Base64 password over HTTP + dealDataWithFun() RCE via MitM. Same util.js/safelogin.js across V5/X6 platform.
Telnet enablement via hw_ctree.xml X_HW_CLITelnetAccess modification. Works on all Dopra Linux ONTs.
Chained exploit: enumeration + brute-force + CSRF + info disclosure. Full chain validated on X6-10, applicable to V5/V5-V2 (same BBSP stack).

devices: Cisco Unified IP Interactive Voice Response

entries.note: Weak SSH cryptographic algorithms (CWE-327). Scanner/check module.
Post-auth OS command injection via smartcontroller API.
Client-side MFA bypass allows unauthenticated admin password reset (CWE-284).
CISA KEV. Unauth RCE via PUT /SDK/webLanguage XML injection. CVSS 9.8.
Auth bypass via token_id manipulation in redirect.asp (goahead).
CISA KEV. APT28/GRU initial access vector (NCSC Apr 2026). Unauth credential disclosure via /loginFs/ path bypass.
Post-auth RCE via Parental Control url_0 injection. Second stage of Quad 7 / APT28 chain.

entries.description: Authentication override cookie bypass in PAN-OS GlobalProtect. gpsvc encrypts cookies with RSA-PKCS1v15 using a certificate whose public key is exposed via TLS handshake when shared with the HTTPS service. No signature verification after decryption -- attacker extracts public key, forges cookie for any username including admin, establishes unauthorized VPN session. CVSS 7.8 HIGH. CISA KEV 2026-05-29. Active exploitation confirmed from 2026-05-17.
devices: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS 11.1.x (< 11.1.15 / various h-fixes)
Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS 11.2.x (< 11.2.12 / various h-fixes)
entries.note: CISA KEV 2026-05-29 (deadline 2026-06-19). Non-default feature (auth override cookies must be enabled). Requires shared cert between cookie encryption and HTTPS service (common default). Fixed: 12.1.7, 11.2.12, 11.1.15, 10.2.18-h6.

devices: TP-Link Archer C5/C7, WDR3500/3600/4300, WR740N-WR941ND, MR3420/MR6400
entries.note: NCSC Apr 2026 advisory. Full APT28/GRU DNS hijack TTP: DHCP DNS rewrite + AITM credential harvest for Outlook/O365.

entries.description: Pre-authentication API bypass via HTTP header spoofing in FortiClient EMS. Django middleware trusts user-controlled X-SSL-CLIENT-VERIFY and X-SSL-Client-Cert headers as equivalent to Apache mod_ssl WSGI output. Certificate chain validation uses only DN string matching with no X.509 signature verification. Forging these headers grants full administrative API access. Actively exploited: Arctic Wolf Labs documented EKZ infostealer delivery via EMS fleet software update push. CISA KEV 2026-04-06.
entries.note: CISA KEV 2026-04-06 (deadline 2026-04-09). In-the-wild exploitation by threat cluster deploying EKZ infostealer (Arctic Wolf Labs). Fixed in 7.4.7 / hotfix 7.4.5.2111 or 7.4.6.2170.

entries.description: Cross-tenant FortiCloud SSO authentication bypass. FortiCloud JWT token accepted without binding to the target device organisation, allowing any FortiCloud account holder to authenticate as admin on any registered FortiGate/FortiManager/FortiAnalyzer. CVSS 9.8.
entries.note: Fixed in FortiOS 7.0.17+, 7.2.11+, 7.4.5+. Workaround: disable FortiCloud SSO.

entries.description: Pre-authentication buffer overflow / restricted URL bypass in Cisco ASA/FTD VPN web server. Unauthenticated attacker can access restricted VPN URL endpoints via crafted HTTPS requests. CWE-120. First stage of FIRESTARTER exploit chain (UAT4356 / ArcaneDoor APT). CISA Emergency Directive ED 25-03.
entries.note: CISA AR26-113A / ED 25-03. FIRESTARTER backdoor persists post-patch via LINA hook. Full remediation requires hard power cycle + reimaging. Chained with CVE-2025-20333.

entries.description: Missing authorization / improper input validation in Cisco ASA/FTD VPN web server. Authenticated attacker (via CVE-2025-20362 or valid VPN creds) can execute arbitrary code as root via crafted HTTPS requests. CWE-862. CVSS 9.9. Second stage of FIRESTARTER exploit chain (UAT4356 / ArcaneDoor APT).
entries.note: UAT4356/ArcaneDoor - same campaign as CVE-2025-20362. RCE as root. FIRESTARTER persistence bypasses firmware update. Hard power cycle + reimaging required.

entries.description: CVSS 10.0. Cisco SD-WAN Manager DTLS auth bypass in vdaemon control-plane. CHALLENGE_ACK with device_type=2 (vHub) bypasses certificate verification on UDP/12346, enabling unauthenticated SSH key injection via MSG_VMANAGE_TO_PEER.

CVSS 10.0. Cisco FMC REST API auth bypass via null-byte injection in Basic auth. FMC middleware issues privileged API token without credential validation. Chained with diagnostic API command injection for unauthenticated root RCE.
CVSS 10.0. Cisco FMC Java deserialization RCE via REST API. CC6/Spring1/Jdk7u21 gadget chains accepted before auth enforcement. Unauthenticated root code execution.
CVSS 7.5. PAN-OS DNS proxy heap-based buffer overflow via crafted DNS response packets. Causes dnsproxyd crash (DoS) or potential RCE.

CVSS 7.2. PAN-OS IKEv2 heap buffer overflow via non-NIST ML-KEM (Kyber) PQC cipher suites with oversized ke_data_length field (0xFFFF). Causes iked crash (DoS) or potential code execution via heap corruption.

CVSS 9.1. PAN-OS Cloud Authentication Service (CAS) SAML auth bypass. Forged SAML responses accepted due to XML canonicalization issues, enabling authentication bypass to GlobalProtect and management plane.
CVSS 9.8. FortiOS SSL-VPN heap overflow RCE. Out-of-bounds write in SSL-VPN request handling allows unauthenticated remote code execution via crafted HTTP requests.
CVSS 9.6. FortiOS SSL-VPN out-of-bounds write RCE. Memory corruption in SSL-VPN session handling path allows pre-authenticated remote code execution (CWE-787).
CVSS 9.8. FortiSwitch unauthenticated admin password change. Missing auth check in FortiSwitch GUI allows unauthenticated attacker to change administrator password.

entries.affected_versions: Check Point Security Gateway R77.20, R80.10-R81.20 with Remote Access VPN or Mobile Access enabled
entries.description: CVSS 8.6. Check Point Security Gateway LFI/information disclosure via path traversal in VPN portal. Reads arbitrary files including /etc/shadow. Chained with credential stuffing for full auth bypass. CISA KEV.
entries.note: CISA KEV. Apply hotfix for all R80+ versions.

entries.affected_versions: Check Point Quantum Network Security Gateway R81, R81.10, R81.20 with Remote Access VPN
entries.description: CVSS 9.8. Check Point Quantum NGFW RCE via crafted packet to IPsec VPN service. Unauthenticated root code execution.
entries.note: Patch: SK182060 hotfix.

entries.affected_versions: Juniper SRX/EX: Junos OS multiple branches < fix versions
entries.description: CVSS 5.3. Juniper SRX/EX J-Web unauthenticated file upload. Chained with CVE-2023-36845 for pre-auth RCE. CISA KEV.
entries.note: CISA KEV. JSA73160. Disable J-Web or restrict access.

entries.affected_versions: Juniper SRX Series: Junos OS 21.x/22.x/23.x pre-fix
entries.description: CVSS 8.1. Juniper SRX J-Web unauthenticated RCE. Improper input validation in J-Web allows command injection via crafted HTTP request.
entries.note: JSA93522. Disable J-Web.

entries.description: CVSS 9.8. SonicWall Gen6 SSL-VPN MFA bypass via LDAP credential passthrough reuse. Valid LDAP credentials bypass OTP/MFA requirements via cached LDAP session exploitation.
entries.note: Patch: SonicOS >= 10.2.1.1-21sv. Disable LDAP passthrough.

entries.description: CVSS 9.8. F5 BIG-IP iControl REST unauthenticated RCE via Connection: X-F5-Auth-Token header bypass. Grants unauthenticated access to /mgmt/tm/util/bash for root command execution. CISA ED-21-02.
entries.note: CISA ED-21-02. Restrict iControl REST to management-only networks.

entries.description: CVSS 9.8. F5 BIG-IP iControl REST auth bypass via X-F5-Auth-Token + Connection hop-by-hop header trick. Grants unauthenticated access to all iControl REST endpoints including /mgmt/tm/util/bash. CISA KEV.
entries.note: CISA KEV. Block external access to iControl REST.

entries.description: CVSS 8.5. F5 BIG-IP iControl REST format string vulnerability (CWE-134). Authenticated admin-to-root privilege escalation via crafted request to /mgmt endpoint.
CVSS 9.8. MikroTik RouterOS heap overflow via crafted RADIUS packet. Unauthenticated heap-based buffer overflow enabling RCE.
entries.note: Patch: RouterOS >= 6.49.8.

entries.description: CVSS 9.1. MikroTik RouterOS privilege escalation from admin to super-admin (root) via RouterOS API. Missing authorization check enables unrestricted access to all router functions.
entries.note: Patch: RouterOS >= 6.49.9 / 7.9.1. Restrict Winbox/API to management networks.

entries.description: CVSS 7.5. MikroTik RouterOS NPK update bypass. Insufficient validation of NPK firmware packages allows installation of unsigned/malicious firmware for persistent code execution.
entries.note: Patch: RouterOS >= 6.45.6 (stable) / 6.44.5 (LTS).

entries.affected_versions: Huawei USG9000 series VRP V500R001C30 and earlier
entries.description: CVSS 9.8. Huawei USG9000 SSL VPN auth bypass + RCE. Integer overflow in auth handler enables unauthenticated root code execution.
devices: Huawei USG9000 series (VRP V500R001C30 and earlier)
entries.note: Apply Huawei VRP firmware update.

entries.description: CVSS 9.1. Huawei USG OS command injection via web management interface diagnostic functions. Authenticated low-privilege user can inject OS commands.
entries.note: Apply Huawei security advisory patches.

entries.description: CVSS 9.8. OPNsense SQLi + RCE in web management interface. Unsanitized login input allows SQL injection leading to auth bypass and OS command execution.
entries.note: Patch: OPNsense >= 21.1.

entries.description: CVSS 9.8. GFI Kerio Control SSRF + RCE. SSRF in upgrade mechanism allows unauthenticated code execution via script injection in upgrade URL parameter. Actively exploited in-the-wild.
entries.note: Patch: GFI Kerio Control >= 9.4.5.

entries.description: CVSS 9.8. Stormshield SNS pre-authentication RCE. Buffer overflow/code injection in web management interface enables unauthenticated root code execution.
entries.note: Patch: SNS >= 3.8.0.

entries.description: CVSS 9.8. Hillstone StoneOS RCE via web management interface. Insufficient input validation enables unauthenticated remote code execution.
entries.note: Apply Hillstone security advisory update.

entries.description: CVSS 8.8. VyOS HTTP API OS command injection. Authenticated API user can inject OS commands via insufficient input sanitization, achieving root code execution.
entries.note: Patch: VyOS 1.3.4+. Restrict HTTP API access.

entries.affected_versions: Citrix ADC and Gateway 10.5, 11.1, 12.0, 12.1, 13.0 (when configured as VPN gateway)
entries.description: Directory traversal in Citrix ADC/NetScaler allows unauthenticated RCE via Perl template injection through /vpn/../vpns/portal/scripts/newbm.pl. CVSS 9.8. CISA KEV.
Unauthenticated RCE via stack buffer overflow in NetScaler ADC/Citrix Gateway when configured as Gateway, ICA Proxy, CVPN, or RDP Proxy vserver. CVSS 9.8. CISA KEV.
